subcodes.first_line: Victory is of two kinds: material and spiritual. Material victory is not so important but spiritual victory is conducive to the life of the world of humanity.
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @unity; oneness of humanity
